requirement_topic.en: LERC / LEC Grid Connection — 120/240 V, 60 Hz and Project-Specific Approval
requirement_topic.zh: LERC / LEC并网接入——120/240 V、60 Hz及项目专属审批
requirement_topic.zht: LERC / LEC併網接入——120/240 V、60 Hz及項目專屬審批

summary.en: Liberia's electricity sector is regulated by the Liberia Electricity Regulatory Commission (LERC), while the Liberia Electricity Corporation (LEC) is the principal public utility for grid electricity in Monrovia and connected service areas. Liberia's low-voltage service is commonly described as 120/240 V at 60 Hz, reflecting US/Americo-Liberian electrical influence, not the 230/400 V 50 Hz IEC utility pattern. Public electricity access remains low and the grid is still rebuilding after severe post-war infrastructure losses, with donor-backed expansion and regional WAPP/CLSG imports. Any grid-connected EV charger project should therefore be treated as a project-specific LERC/LEC review covering service capacity, metering, protection, load impact, power quality, installation safety, and commissioning. A publicly accessible Liberia EV-charger grid code or national charging-station interconnection specification could not be confirmed as of 2026-06-14.
summary.zh: 利比里亚电力行业由利比里亚电力监管委员会（LERC）监管，利比里亚电力公司（LEC）是蒙罗维亚及已接入区域的主要公共电网公用事业。利比里亚低压供电通常描述为120/240 V、60 Hz，体现美国/美裔利比里亚电气体系影响，而非230/400 V、50 Hz的IEC公用电力模式。公共电力接入率仍然较低，电网在战后严重基础设施损失后仍处于重建阶段，并依赖捐助方支持扩网和WAPP/CLSG区域进口电力。因此，任何并网电动汽车充电桩项目均应按项目专属LERC/LEC审查处理，范围包括供电容量、计量、保护、负荷影响、电能质量、安装安全和调试。截至2026年6月14日，未能确认利比里亚公开发布了电动汽车充电桩并网规范或全国充电站接入技术规范。
summary.zht: 賴比瑞亞電力行業由賴比瑞亞電力監管委員會（LERC）監管，賴比瑞亞電力公司（LEC）是蒙羅維亞及已接入區域的主要公共電網公用事業。賴比瑞亞低壓供電通常描述為120/240 V、60 Hz，體現美國/美裔賴比瑞亞電氣體系影響，而非230/400 V、50 Hz的IEC公用電力模式。公共電力接入率仍然較低，電網在戰後嚴重基礎設施損失後仍處於重建階段，並依賴捐助方支持擴網和WAPP/CLSG區域進口電力。因此，任何併網電動汽車充電樁項目均應按項目專屬LERC/LEC審查處理，範圍包括供電容量、計量、保護、負荷影響、電能品質、安裝安全和調試。截至2026年6月14日，未能確認賴比瑞亞公開發布了電動汽車充電樁併網規範或全國充電站接入技術規範。

standards_or_laws: Liberia Electricity Regulatory Commission (LERC) electricity-sector regulation and licensing framework
Liberia Electricity Corporation (LEC) project-specific service connection and metering requirements
Liberia grid context: 120/240 V low-voltage service, 60 Hz frequency; confirm actual service voltage at the site
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
World Bank / donor electricity-access and grid-rebuilding context

summary.en: China domestic EV charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local state-grid project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Liberia's 120/240 V, 60 Hz context is materially different: transformers, rectifier front ends, contactors, protection devices, metering, firmware frequency settings, harmonic emissions, and thermal performance must be validated for 60 Hz service and the actual LEC connection point.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。利比里亚120/240 V、60 Hz环境存在实质差异：变压器、整流前端、接触器、保护器件、计量、固件频率设置、谐波发射和热性能均须针对60 Hz供电及实际LEC接入点进行验证。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。賴比瑞亞120/240 V、60 Hz環境存在實質差異：變壓器、整流前端、接觸器、保護器件、計量、韌體頻率設置、諧波發射和熱性能均須針對60 Hz供電及實際LEC接入點進行驗證。

standards_or_laws: China State Grid / Southern Grid local project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) input-voltage range covers Liberia's actual service, commonly 120/240 V single-phase at 60 Hz, and any three-phase service offered by LEC for the site; (2) 60 Hz operation is validated by hardware and firmware evidence, not inferred from China 50 Hz testing; (3) harmonic, flicker, surge immunity, and protective-device coordination are acceptable for weak or constrained feeders; (4) service capacity, metering, earthing, drawings, load calculations, and commissioning documents are accepted by LEC and any LERC process; (5) tropical humidity, corrosion, and high ambient operation are covered by derating evidence. China 220/380 V 50 Hz design evidence is not Liberia grid-ready by itself.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 输入电压范围覆盖利比里亚实际供电，通常为120/240 V单相、60 Hz，以及LEC为该场址提供的任何三相供电；(2) 60 Hz运行具有硬件和固件证据，而非从中国50 Hz测试推断；(3) 谐波、闪变、浪涌抗扰和保护器件配合适用于薄弱或容量受限馈线；(4) 供电容量、计量、接地、图纸、负荷计算和调试文件被LEC及任何LERC流程接受；(5) 具备热带湿度、腐蚀和高环境温度运行的降额证据。中国220/380 V、50 Hz设计证据本身并不能证明满足利比里亚并网要求。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 輸入電壓範圍覆蓋賴比瑞亞實際供電，通常為120/240 V單相、60 Hz，以及LEC為該場址提供的任何三相供電；(2) 60 Hz運行具有硬體和韌體證據，而非從中國50 Hz測試推斷；(3) 諧波、閃變、浪湧抗擾和保護器件配合適用於薄弱或容量受限饋線；(4) 供電容量、計量、接地、圖紙、負荷計算和調試文件被LEC及任何LERC流程接受；(5) 具備熱帶濕度、腐蝕和高環境溫度運行的降額證據。中國220/380 V、50 Hz設計證據本身並不能證明滿足賴比瑞亞併網要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects — LERC regulatory context and LEC service-connection acceptance are project gates; Liberia-specific EVSE interconnection rules were not confirmed publicly, so direct LERC/LEC confirmation is required
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an LERC or LEC approval substitute; China 50 Hz evidence does not establish Liberia 60 Hz readiness

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Liberia grid connection as a project-specific LERC/LEC engineering approval. A China 220/380 V 50 Hz charger package must be revalidated for Liberia's 120/240 V, 60 Hz service, weak-grid power quality, and humid tropical field conditions before shipment or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将利比里亚并网接入视为项目专属LERC/LEC工程审批。中国220/380 V、50 Hz充电桩资料包须针对利比里亚120/240 V、60 Hz供电、薄弱电网电能质量和湿热现场条件重新验证后，方可出货或安装。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將賴比瑞亞併網接入視為項目專屬LERC/LEC工程審批。中國220/380 V、50 Hz充電樁資料包須針對賴比瑞亞120/240 V、60 Hz供電、薄弱電網電能品質和濕熱現場條件重新驗證後，方可出貨或安裝。
